mission.title: opentofu: [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)
mission.description: [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault). Requested by 82+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentofu deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentofu version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
helm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentofu installation.

steps.title: Review opentofu configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu
```
**Parent:** #1030
**Depends on:** #1166
**Blueprint PR:** #1132

## Acceptance criteria

1. Implement a key provider that loads an encryption key from the Azure Key Vault.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)
steps.description:
Implementation of the azure key provider.

Currently only works with the default env vars: 
```bash
export AZURE_TENANT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET="..."
```

TODO:

## Target Release

1.7.0
```yaml
export AZURE_TENANT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET="..."
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[State Encryption] Key providers (Azure Key Vault)" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Implementation of the azure key provider.

Currently only works with the default env vars: 
```bash
export AZURE_TENANT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_ID="..."
export AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET="..."
```

TODO:

## Target Release

1.7.0

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentofu installed or the issue environment reproducible.
